contract_name: HELM v1.0 General Availability (GA) Authorization Contract
mandatory_evidence_required: 74/74 HELM Qualification Suite tests passing with zero failures
134/134 Repository Unit tests passing with zero failures
30 consecutive days of monotonic operational burn-in telemetry
Bounded TLA+ formal verification proof generated and verified
Release Candidate package manifest SHA-256 integrity verified
prohibited_conditions: Zero release-blocking defects in defect disposition ledger
Zero hash-chain divergence or missing telemetry windows in burn-in harness
Zero unhandled panic/crash regressions in mission runtime engine
Zero critical or high security vulnerabilities
automatic_blocking_triggers: Failure of any HELM qualification test case
Tampering or hash mismatch in telemetry observation log
Unauthorized code modification to RC1 candidate binary

qualification_invalidation_reset_hierarc.policy: Operational Board Review required; telemetry resumed without candidate rebuild.
Burn-in window reset; root cause investigation conducted before resuming observation.
Candidate identity incremented (rc1 -> rc2); 30-day burn-in window restarted from Day 0.
Governance record updated without candidate rebuild or burn-in reset.

founder_authorization_requirement: Explicit cryptographic or doorstep approval from Executive Release Authority (Founder) via GOV-G005 gate
